metadata.description: Zombie Brains — deterministic memory hooks + proactive skills for Claude Code. Hooks inject protocol from the shell side; proactive skills fire from Claude's trusted side. Stacked redundancy for reliable memory capture, recall, and session continuity.

plugins.name: zombie-brains
plugins.description: Deterministic memory hooks + proactive skills for Claude Code. Hooks force load_brain, search_memory, add_memory, and log_session at lifecycle events; proactive skills (zombie-bootstrap, zombie-recall, zombie-capture, zombie-session-end) fire from Claude's trusted side for belt-and-suspenders compliance. All memory ops routed through the Zombie Brains MCP — no ZOMBIE_API_KEY required.
